title: DevilAura
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/366aa4e9d54f1ae583dd1efb141ca24409474260.png) **Pack Version** (Last)**:** v1.1

**Created by:**

> Me ( [@GalacticUniv](https://discord.gg/72dHTWJr6R) )

**Available in the following versions:**

> 1.16 - 1.20.1 | 1.20.2+

**Tags**:

> Custom, Paid, Black, Red, 32x, Demon

**Description:**

> DevilAura is another texture pack I was commissioned to create. It was the first pack I was asked to make, and honestly, it’s one of the most beautiful ones on the server. The main theme is red with red silhouettes, giving it a bold and striking aesthetic. It has become one of the most complete and visually stunning texture packs on the server.
> 
> This texture pack is designed for Netherite only, but you can download the diamond version here!

> Don't forget that downloading the texture pack from the official sources (In PlanetMinecraft) is a huge way to support us! <3

> If you have any questions or want to report a bug, feel free to do so through our official Discord: <https://discord.gg/72dHTWJr6R>

> You can also follow us on social media! :D [https://solo.to/galacticuniv](https://solo.to/galacticuniv)

![Compatible with](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/960c76ddd8a7ab7c7e79ad788f87bc2899f76960_0.webp)

*   You can download Apple Skin here: [Download Apple Skin (Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
*   You can download Fabric Sky Boxes here: [Download Fabric Sky Boxes (Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes)
